directive.title: FLOWSEER-RESP-002b: Extend Responsive Chart Fixes to Remaining Dashboard Pages Beyond ChartComponents.tsx

auditor.summary: The build is incomplete and fails most acceptance criteria. Only 1 of 5 required page files was modified (spend-analytics/page.tsx), and that file has critical issues: KPI component prop mismatches, non-existent ResponsiveChartWrapper props (onResize, aspect), and hardcoded tickInterval that bypasses the useChartDimensions hook. The audit script is created but doesn't validate Tooltip overflow props. No Playwright tests or TypeScript compilation verification was provided. The build is not shippable in its current state. Score: 40/100 - FAIL.

top_issues.description: The KPI component is imported but used with props (title, change, trend) that don't match the actual KPI component signature. The real KPI component expects 'label' and 'value' props, not 'title', 'change', and 'trend'. This will cause TypeScript compilation errors.

ResponsiveChartWrapper is used with an 'onResize' prop and 'aspect' prop that don't exist in the actual ResponsiveChartWrapper component. The real component accepts 'mobileAspectRatio' (not 'aspect') and does not have an 'onResize' callback.

The Panel component is used with a 'className' prop that sets fixed height (h-96, h-80). This conflicts with the responsive chart wrapper's aspect-ratio-based sizing and may cause overflow or layout issues at mobile viewports.
